final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic scroll illustration of the Lantern Festival in Tang Dynasty Chang'an (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "工笔重彩长卷" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 唐代吴道子 figure painting tradition, 张萱/周昉 court-lady compositions, 清明上河图 narrative scroll structure; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be panoramic horizontal scroll format capturing the full cityscape
Subject: must include thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky, festival crowds, and Tang Dynasty Chang'an cityscape
Scene/backdrop: must be Tang Dynasty 长安城 (Chang'an) during Lantern Festival night
Lighting/mood: needs a festive night atmosphere with lantern glow — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, saturated direction — exact pigment values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
